name: Sushi Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Gently rinse the rice a couple of times until the water is clear. Drain it in a colander for half an hour.
2. Place the rice and water in a heavy pot covered tightly with a lid. Cook over medium-high heat for 10 minutes until steam escapes the lid.
3. Immediately turn the heat to low and cook for 10 - 15 minutes, until all the water has been absorbed. Remove from the heat and let the rice stand, covered, for 10 minutes.
4. In a small saucepan, heat the mirin, vinegar, and salt until the salt is dissolved.
While the rice is cooling by vigorously fanning it (newspapers or an electric fan can be used, as well as a friend), slowly stir in the mirin mixture. Continue stirring and fanning until the rice is cool.
